Author: XeldarAlz
Name: AutoDeepDungeon
Description: Automates solo Deep Dungeon runs (Palace of the Dead, Heaven-on-High, Eureka Orthos). Queues, navigates, fights, handles pomanders and bosses. /adg to start. Requires vnavmesh; RotationSolver or WrathCombo; BossMod and PalacePal strongly recommended.
